title: Open WebUI Rebranding Config Schema

appName.description: Brand name shown in the UI (replaces 'Open WebUI').

suffixStrategy.description: Controls env.py logic about appending ' (Open WebUI)' to WEBUI_NAME when overridden.

companyName.description: Company display name (used in attribution blocks when enabled).

copyrightOwner.description: Copyright owner string (used in About/attribution when enabled).

colors.description: Hex colors used for theme meta tags.

png.description: Source path to logo.png used in PWA manifest

website.description: Brand website URL (About attribution links when enabled)

license.description: Optional license URL for About attribution when enabled

discord.description: Optional Discord invite (only used if keepCommunityLinks=false)

twitterUrl.description: Optional Twitter/X profile URL (only used if keepCommunityLinks=false)

twitterHandle.description: Optional Twitter/X handle without '@' (only used if keepCommunityLinks=false)

githubUrl.description: Optional GitHub repo URL (only used if keepCommunityLinks=false)

githubStarsBadgeLabel.description: Optional label for stars badge query (only used if keepCommunityLinks=false)

webuiFaviconUrl.description: Optional WEBUI_FAVICON_URL override in backend env.py

openwebuiTeamName.description: Optional replacement for 'Open WebUI team' phrase (defaults to appName).

description: Configuration used by branding-applier to apply deterministic UI rebranding.
